policy.paper_canonical: Prefer DOI URL when a DOI is verified and locally resolvable without repeated access limits; otherwise use the publisher or PubMed landing page.
policy.secondary_anchor: Keep DOI or PMID when available to reduce link-drift ambiguity.

entries.title: Benchmarking informatics workflows for data-independent acquisition single-cell proteomics
entries.notes: Direct DIA-SCP workflow and task-design evidence; not a stable public dataset entrypoint by itself.

entries.title: Protein-level batch-effect correction enhances robustness in MS-based proteomics
entries.notes: Protein-level endpoint and balanced/confounded interpretation evidence.

entries.title: Benchmarking atlas-level data integration in single-cell genomics
entries.notes: High-value benchmark framework for batch removal, bio-conservation, and representation-sensitive evaluation.

entries.title: Multitask benchmarking of single-cell multimodal omics integration methods
entries.notes: Output-type- and task-specific benchmarking evidence; useful for AutoSelect and z-score representation boundaries.

entries.title: Essential guidelines for computational method benchmarking
entries.notes: General computational benchmarking and reporting guidance.

entries.title: DIA-NN: neural networks and interference correction enable deep proteome coverage in high throughput
entries.notes: Primary DIA-NN algorithm paper; use for vendor semantics and DIA context, not as a benchmark paper.

entries.resource_type: 模块规范 / 软件文档
entries.title: DIA-NN documentation
entries.notes: Canonical semantic source for DIA-NN output fields, MBR, zero quantities, and upstream normalization options.

entries.resource_type: 模块规范 / 软件文档
entries.title: Spectronaut manual landing page
entries.notes: Canonical semantic source for Spectronaut report fields and upstream normalization behavior.

entries.resource_type: 模块规范 / 软件文档
entries.title: scib-metrics documentation
entries.notes: Canonical implementation semantics for integration metrics.

entries.resource_type: 模块规范 / 软件文档
entries.title: scIB user guide
entries.notes: Canonical user guide for integration metrics and benchmark framing.

entries.title: A test metric for assessing single-cell RNA-seq batch correction
entries.notes: Primary kBET metric paper.

entries.title: Fast, sensitive and accurate integration of single-cell data with Harmony
entries.notes: Primary Harmony paper and original LISI family evaluation context.

entries.title: Initial recommendations for performing, benchmarking and reporting single-cell proteomics experiments
entries.notes: Community reporting and benchmarking guidance for single-cell proteomics.

entries.title: Prioritized mass spectrometry increases the depth, sensitivity and data completeness of single-cell proteomics
entries.notes: Control-aware SCP QC evidence; includes negative-control-based CV filtering.

entries.title: Quantification Quality Control Emerges as a Crucial Factor to Enhance Single-Cell Proteomics Data Analysis
entries.notes: Primary quantification-QC evidence for single-cell proteomics.

entries.title: scplainer: using linear models to understand mass spectrometry-based single-cell proteomics data
entries.notes: Primary single-cell proteomics evidence for batch-aware linear modeling and intensity covariates.

entries.title: A Framework for Quality Control in Quantitative Proteomics
entries.notes: Primary QC framework for quantitative proteomics; strongly transferable to sample-level SCP QC.

entries.title: Establishing Quality Control Procedures for Large-Scale Plasma Proteomics Analyses
entries.venue: Journal of the American Society for Mass Spectrometry
entries.notes: Primary large-scale proteomics QC workflow reference.

entries.title: Single cell proteomic analysis defines discrete neutrophil functional states in human glioblastoma
entries.notes: Latest SCP evidence for explicit 0-cell controls and dataset-specific sample filtering.

entries.title: Automated single-cell proteomics providing sufficient proteome depth to study complex biology beyond cell type classifications
entries.notes: Public SCP dataset paper and batch-aware processing reference.

entries.title: Normalyzer: a tool for rapid evaluation of normalization methods for omics data sets
entries.notes: Primary omics normalization-evaluation paper; use for data-dependent method selection, not as DIA-SCP-specific evidence.

entries.title: zMAP: a data normalization strategy enabling comparative analysis of quantitative proteomics data
entries.notes: Primary proteomics z-transformation paper; important to separate model-based z-transforms from generic per-feature z-score layers.

entries.title: Shortcomings of silhouette-based evaluation in single-cell integration benchmarking
entries.notes: Primary warning against over-reliance on silhouette-family scores.

entries.title: Selection of Features with Consistent Profiles Improves Relative Protein Quantification in Mass Spectrometry Experiments
entries.notes: Feature-consistency evidence relevant to QC and aggregation.

entries.title: Accounting for the Multiple Natures of Missing Values in Label-Free Quantitative Proteomics Data Sets to Compare Imputation Strategies
entries.notes: Primary missingness-mechanism reference reused across QC, missingness, and state-aware metrics reviews.

entries.title: HarmonizR enables data harmonization across independent proteomic datasets with appropriate handling of missing values
entries.notes: Primary missing-aware harmonization paper; shared across batch-correction, missingness, state-aware metrics, and imputation reviews.

entries.title: Adjusting batch effects in microarray expression data using empirical Bayes methods
entries.notes: Primary ComBat paper; registry canonicalizes shared ComBat references to DOI.

entries.title: limma powers differential expression analyses for RNA-sequencing and microarray studies
entries.notes: Primary limma framework paper used as canonical shared reference for linear-model batch handling.

entries.title: Batch effects in single-cell RNA-sequencing data are corrected by matching mutual nearest neighbors
entries.notes: Primary MNN correction paper; retained as method-family evidence for non-linear integration baselines.

entries.title: Efficient integration of heterogeneous single-cell transcriptomes using Scanorama
entries.notes: Primary Scanorama paper; registry canonicalizes shared non-linear batch-correction references to DOI.

entries.title: Tail-Robust Quantile Normalization
entries.notes: Primary TRQN paper; shared across normalization and log-scale reviews.

entries.title: Strategies to enable large-scale proteomics for reproducible research
entries.notes: Primary ProNorM / large-scale proteomics reproducibility paper; registry fixes prior author drift in local reviews.

entries.title: Accurate Label-Free Quantification by directLFQ to Compare Unlimited Numbers of Proteomes
entries.notes: Primary directLFQ paper; registry replaces prior dead Nature URL and incorrect title variants.

entries.title: Accurate Proteome-wide Label-free Quantification by Delayed Normalization and Maximal Peptide Ratio Extraction, Termed MaxLFQ
entries.notes: Primary MaxLFQ paper; shared across aggregation, I/O state-mapping, and log-scale reviews.

entries.title: Increasing the throughput of sensitive proteomics by plexDIA
entries.notes: Primary plexDIA paper; shared as multiplex-DIA completeness and normalization-context evidence.

entries.title: Reproducibility standards for machine learning in the life sciences
entries.notes: Primary ML reproducibility standards paper reused in AutoSelect/reporting reviews.

entries.title: MassIVE dataset MSV000093867
entries.notes: Stable public dataset landing page for the Ctortecka et al. SCP study; keep distinct from the paper page.

entries.title: scpdata
entries.notes: Canonical scriptable public resource-package entrypoint for SCP examples and small-scale reproducible demos.

entries.resource_type: 模块规范 / 软件文档
entries.title: ProteoBench DIA single-cell module
entries.notes: Stable community benchmark module entrypoint for DIA single-cell task definitions, outputs, and evaluation interfaces.

entries.title: A comparative study of evaluating missing value imputation methods in label-free proteomics
entries.notes: Shared masking-design evidence for imputation benchmarking under controlled missing-rate and MNAR-rate grids.

entries.title: Comparative assessment and novel strategy on methods for imputing proteomics data
entries.notes: Shared evidence for imputation benchmarks that preserve real missingness structure before masking observed values.

entries.title: Imputation of label-free quantitative mass spectrometry-based proteomics data using self-supervised deep learning
entries.notes: Shared learned-imputation evidence; keeps masking protocol itself as part of the benchmark contract.

entries.title: NAguideR: performing and prioritizing missing value imputations for consistent bottom-up proteomic analyses
entries.notes: Shared imputation-reporting and prioritization framework; PMC landing page is preferred here to avoid DOI/OUP resolver instability.
